name: White Chocolate Chocolate Chip Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chocolate chips or grated semi-sweet chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and sugar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes.
2. Move mixture to a double boiler over low heat. Add white chocolate and melt completely.
3. Remove from heat and stir in Creme de Cassis and vanilla until well combined.
4. Pour mixture into an ice cream maker and churn according to manufacturer's instructions.
5. Fold in chocolate chips or grated semi-sweet chocolate just before churning is complete.
6. Continue churning until the sorbet reaches a firm, scoopable texture.
7. Transfer to a freezer-safe container and freeze for at least 2 hours before serving.
